markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the process for building and refining the Parloa content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Start with the MVP Pipeline:** Use the standard MVP pipeline (Research → Draft → Internal Links → Source → Proofread → Metadata → SEO Metadata → Fact-checking) as the baseline for Parloa.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Assignment Directions are Core:** The Assignment Direction is the central control, repeating key instructions across all steps to ensure Atlas prioritizes them and to avoid context window overload from calling full artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Involve Tamy for Major Changes:** File a Linear ticket for Tamy's review before adding new steps (e.g., image generation), making substantial instruction changes (e.g., doubling link count), or overhauling the Assignment Direction template.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Provide Specific Feedback:** When reporting issues, provide concrete examples or "before/after" rewrites. This gives Tamy objective data to train the AI, enabling faster, more precise fixes than vague feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Topics

### Parloa Pipeline Status

  - [**Goal:** Build the Parloa content pipeline by this week to enable calibration article delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Uncertainty on the best process for building pipelines, especially with new review standards from Kirkland.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Standard Pipeline & Customization

  - [**MVP Pipeline:** Tamy has created a standard MVP agentic pipeline as the starting point.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Research → Draft → Internal Links → Source → Proofread → Metadata → SEO Metadata → Fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Optional Customizations:** Add steps based on client needs and preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Image Generation:** AI-generated vs. manual sourcing.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**CMS Publishing:** Direct pipeline publishing vs. manual copy-pasting.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

### Artifacts & Assignment Directions

  - [**New Artifact:** Tamy created an "AI Business Editor" artifact for post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Improve readability by flagging passive voice, AI phrasing, and other stylistic issues.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [**Action:** Nathalie must customize the Brex-based guidelines for Parloa.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Assignment Direction Strategy:** The Assignment Direction is the core control for the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It repeats high-priority instructions (e.g., voice, style) across all steps, ensuring Atlas prioritizes them without overloading the context window by calling full artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Template:** The standard template covers Overview, Goal, Topic, Brand Integration, Voice & Style, and Key Differentiation.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### Collaboration & Feedback Process

  - [**Ownership:** The delivery team is the primary owner of artifacts; content engineers are accountable for their pipeline implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**When to Involve Tamy (Linear Ticket):**](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [Adding new steps (e.g., image generation).](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [Substantially changing the Assignment Direction template.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Making major instruction changes (e.g., doubling internal link count), as this requires new rules to prevent poor placement.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Feedback Method:** Provide specific examples or "before/after" rewrites, not just vague descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Why:** This gives Tamy objective data to train the AI, enabling faster and more precise fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathalie:** Test the Parloa pipeline by comparing its output to existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [**Nathalie:** Customize the "AI Business Editor" artifact for Parloa.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Nathalie:** Document specific feedback with examples or "before/after" rewrites.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Nathalie:** File a Linear ticket for Tamy's review if major pipeline changes are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/zvtA7PMfMy1eqUoz-MgN6uy5Nc62Z5wi?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
